name: Mushroom Crust Quiche (Pjs)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups (8 oz) Shredded Jack or Swiss Cheese
1 cup Small or Large Curd Cottage Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan over medium heat, sauté the mushrooms in 3 tablespoons of butter until they become limp.
2. Stir in the crushed crackers and transfer the mixture evenly to a well-greased 9-inch pie pan.
3. Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter, add onions, and sauté until they become limp. Spread the onions over the crust and sprinkle with shredded cheese.
4. In a blender, combine cottage cheese, eggs, and cayenne pepper until smooth. Pour into the crust and sprinkle with paprika.
5. Bake in a 350 degree oven for about 20 to 25 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let stand for 10 to 15 minutes before cutting.
7. Serve this savory quiche with a fresh spinach or mixed green salad.
